metadata.source: Kenneth R. French Data Library — F-F Research Data Factors (monthly)
metadata.description: Monthly total return of CRSP value-weighted US equity market (Mkt-RF + RF from Fama-French monthly factors). Equivalent to a broad US total-market index proxy (similar to VTI/VTSMX).
metadata.license: Free for academic/non-commercial use per Kenneth French Data Library terms
